channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CRAFTSMAN] Craftsman Automation Exits Investment in RC Green Powers
item.description:
Craftsman Automation Ltd has announced its complete exit from its equity investment in RC Green Powers Private Limited (RCGPPL). This divestment follows earlier intimations regarding the investment made under the Group Captive Scheme. As a result, Craftsman Automation no longer holds any equity shares or interest in RCGPPL. The company stated that this exit does not have any material impact on its operations or financial position.

  • Craftsman Automation fully exited its RCGPPL investment.
  • The investment was initially made under a Group Captive Scheme.
  • Company no longer holds any equity shares or interest in RCGPPL.
  • The exit has no material impact on operations or financial position.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Craftsman Automation Ltd | Category: Divestment

item.title: [GRSE] GRSE Board to meet Apr 27 for FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 27, 2026. The key agenda items for this meeting include considering and approving the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a final dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26. In accordance with insider trading regulations, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities is closed for all insiders from April 1, 2026, until April 29, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To approve Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • To consider recommending a final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to April 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMAL] Amal Ltd Clarifies Price Movement, Cites Market-Driven Factors
item.description:
Amal Ltd responded to a BSE query dated April 09, 2026, regarding unusual price movement in its shares. The company stated that it consistently complies with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by making timely disclosures. The last such disclosure was on March 26, 2026, concerning a scheduled Board meeting. Furthermore, the trading window for the company's securities is currently closed from April 01, 2026, to April 24, 2026, in anticipation of a Board meeting on April 22, 2026. Amal Ltd attributed any recent price fluctuations to market-driven factors, disclaiming any specific company-related news as the cause.

  • Amal Ltd clarified unusual share price movement.
  • Company attributes price changes to market forces.
  • Trading window closed for upcoming Board meeting.
  • Last disclosure was on March 26, 2026.
  • Company asserts compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMAL LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [MORGAN] Morgan Ventures clarifies share price movement is market driven
item.description:
Morgan Ventures Ltd responded to a stock exchange query regarding significant share price movement. The company stated that it has consistently disclosed all material information relevant to its operations and performance, adhering to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Morgan Ventures further clarified that it is unaware of the specific reasons behind the recent significant movement in its share price, attributing it purely to market-driven factors. The management explicitly denied any connection or involvement with the share price fluctuations and reiterated its commitment to ongoing compliance with all applicable listing regulations and laws.

  • Company received query on significant share price movement.
  • Morgan Ventures attributes price movement to market forces.
  • Management denies involvement in share price fluctuations.
  • Company confirms adherence to all SEBI disclosure norms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MORGAN VENTURES LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [PAYTM*] Paytm incorporates Indonesia subsidiary with ₹8.15 Cr investment
item.description:
One 97 Communications Ltd (Paytm) has announced the incorporation of a new wholly owned step-down subsidiary, PT PAYTM INDONESIA TEKNOLOGI, in Indonesia on April 10, 2026. This new entity was formed by Paytm Cloud Technologies Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Paytm, and Paytm Singapore Pte. Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary of PCTL. The companies subscribed to 15,00,000 equity shares of Indonesian Rupiah 10,000 each, amounting to an aggregate subscription of Indonesian Rupiah 15 billion, which is equivalent to approximately ₹8.15 Crores. This strategic move establishes Paytm Indonesia as a wholly owned step-down subsidiary, expanding Paytm's international operational footprint.

  • Paytm incorporated a wholly owned step-down subsidiary in Indonesia.
  • The new entity, PT PAYTM INDONESIA TEKNOLOGI, was formed on April 10, 2026.
  • Investment totaled IDR 15 billion, approximately ₹8.15 Crores.
  • This expands Paytm's international operational footprint.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: One 97 Communications Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [AMBUJACEM] Ambuja Cements completes Penna Cement merger
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ambuja Cements Ltd announced the effectiveness of its Scheme of Arrangement with Penna Cement Industries Limited on April 10, 2026. The Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench, sanctioned the scheme on March 30, 2026, and the certified order was filed with the Registrar of Companies today. With this filing, all conditions of the scheme have been met, and Penna Cement Industries Limited stands amalgamated with Ambuja Cements and is dissolved without being wound up. The appointed date for the scheme is August 16, 2024. Equity shareholders of Penna Cement as of the effective date, April 10, 2026, will receive cash consideration as per the scheme's terms.

  • Ambuja Cements' scheme with Penna Cement is now effective.
  • Penna Cement Industries is amalgamated with Ambuja Cements.
  • Effective date for the merger is April 10, 2026.
  • Penna Cement shareholders will receive cash consideration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMBUJA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [SMAUTO] SM Auto Stamping: BSE Waives ₹2.1 Lakh Fine
item.description:
BSE has waived off a fine of ₹2,10,000 previously levied on SM Auto Stamping Ltd. The fine was imposed due to the non-submission of consolidated financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2024, under SEBI Listing Regulations. The company had intimated the fine on July 1, 2024, and subsequently submitted a waiver request on July 11, 2024. BSE's "Internal Regulatory Oversight and Review Group" approved the waiver request via an e-mail dated April 10, 2026. The company stated that this waiver has no impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

  • BSE waived a ₹2.1 lakh fine on SM Auto Stamping Ltd.
  • The fine was for late submission of Q4 FY24 consolidated financial results.
  • Waiver was granted following the company's request.
  • The company confirms no financial or operational impact from this event.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SM Auto Stamping Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [SEAMECLTD] Seamec Diamond vessel returns to ONGC contract, on-hire
item.description:
Seamec Ltd announced that its vessel "SEAMEC DIAMOND" has completed its statutory drydocking. Following this, the vessel has returned to the field and resumed its contract with ONGC. The vessel is now on-hire with effect from April 10, 2026, at 21:36 hrs. This update follows a previous intimation dated February 18, 2026, regarding the vessel being off-hire for the drydocking period. The resumption of operations signifies the vessel's return to revenue-generating activities for the company.

  • Seamec's vessel "SEAMEC DIAMOND" completed statutory drydocking.
  • The vessel has resumed its contract with ONGC.
  • It is now on-hire effective April 10, 2026.
  • This marks the end of the off-hire period for maintenance.
  • Revenue generation from the vessel is expected to restart.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEAMEC LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DABUR] Dabur India fined ₹4 Lakh for FSSAI labelling violation
item.description:
Dabur India Ltd has been penalized ₹4,00,000 by the Addl. District Magistrate, Almora, for alleged contravention of Sections 26 and 27 of The Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006 (FSSAI Act). The violation pertains to the labelling of one of the company's products. Dabur India received the order on April 10, 2026, and considers the demand not maintainable. The company plans to file an appeal before the 1st Appellate Authority, asserting strong merits in its case and anticipating a favorable outcome in higher forums. Dabur states that this order has no impact on its financial, operational, or other activities.

  • Dabur India fined ₹4 lakh by Almora Magistrate.
  • Penalty for alleged FSSAI labelling violation.
  • Company to appeal, deems demand not maintainable.
  • No financial or operational impact expected.
  • Dabur anticipates favorable outcome in higher forums.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DABUR INDIA LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [NEETUYOSHI] Neetu Yoshi clarifies price movement, cites recent debt-free status
item.description:
Neetu Yoshi Ltd responded to a query regarding significant price movement in its security, stating it regularly discloses all material information. The company highlighted a recent disclosure from April 06, 2026, announcing the repayment of all outstanding bank borrowings, making it debt-free. Neetu Yoshi Ltd affirmed that, apart from this, there are no other events or impending announcements that could influence its share price behavior, attributing the current movement to market forces beyond its control. The company committed to continue informing the Exchange of any future material events.

  • Company clarified significant share price movement.
  • Highlighted becoming debt-free on April 06, 2026.
  • Repaid all outstanding bank borrowings.
  • Stated no other price-sensitive information exists.
  • Attributed price movement to market forces.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neetu Yoshi Ltd | Category: Clarification
